_doc: Mocked public-safe BPMN operate cancel of a single running instance.

rules.match: maestro bpmn instance cancel inst-run-002 -f folder-public
maestro bpmn instance cancel inst-run-002 --folder-key folder-public
maestro bpmn instance get inst-run-002 -f folder-public
maestro bpmn instance get inst-run-002 --folder-key folder-public
